briefdescription.para: Preprocessor macro to convert irq from level 1 to level 2 format.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Preprocessor macro to convert irq from level 1 to level 3 format.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

memberdef.definition: Size of _z_irq_t must equal to uint32_t
memberdef.name: uint32_t

briefdescription.para: Return IRQ level This routine returns the interrupt level number of the provided interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

simplesect.para: 1 if IRQ level 1, 2 if IRQ level 2, 3 if IRQ level 3

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the second level irq number of the zephyr irq number passed in

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Converts irq from level 1 to level 2 format.

detaileddescription.para: This routine converts the input into the level 2 irq number format

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Returns the parent IRQ of the level 2 raw IRQ number.

detaileddescription.para: The parent of a 2nd level interrupt is in the 1st byte

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the third level irq number of the zephyr irq number passed in

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Converts irq from level 1 to level 3 format.

detaileddescription.para: This routine converts the input into the level 3 irq number format

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Returns the parent IRQ of the level 3 raw IRQ number.

detaileddescription.para: The parent of a 3rd level interrupt is in the 2nd byte

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Return the interrupt number for a given level.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Converts irq from level 1 to a given level.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

simplesect.para: Converted IRQ number in the level

briefdescription.para: Returns the parent IRQ of the given level raw IRQ number.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

simplesect.para: IRQ parent of the given level

briefdescription.para: Returns the parent interrupt controller IRQ of the given IRQ number.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format

briefdescription.para: Increments the multilevel-encoded irq by val.

parameterdescription.para: IRQ number in its zephyr format
